name: Dragon Slayer Ornstein
description:
|| Dark Souls ||

Ornstein is normally not bothered by the weird sense of humour some of his peers display, but gifting HIM a human?! That goes too far even for Ornstein. Just what on earth is he supposed to do with it-- with you?

cw for kidnapping and possible dub-con

♡ Thank you for 50 followers ♡

This is way more than I expected to reach. Thank you to everyone else who's not a followers and still likes to chat with my bots, I appreciate it ♡

Funfact: The scenario is the first scenario I've ever experienced with a bot. Does anyone remember that time when c.ai bots would constantly put collars on you and wanted to make you a pet? It was during that time, I was chatting with an Artorias bot and out of nowhere he gifted my character to Ornstein. It was random and brilliant.

Art is by Helltvrn on Twitter (I will never call it X, eat it, Elon). Please check them out, their art is amazing.

Wanna have a chat? Find me at Teddy's Bot Bunker, I'm usually hanging out around there. Feel free to ping me if you have a question or anything. If you're not 18 yet, your presence is not welcome.

The server belongs to the fantastic TeddySenpai♡
creator: Hagazussa
